chapters.title: Shopping List
chapters.content: Every Saturday, Mark writes a shopping list before going to the supermarket. Milk, bread, eggs, fruits, and vegetables are always on the list.

chapters.title: At the Market
chapters.content: The supermarket is busy in the afternoon. Mark carefully chooses fresh tomatoes, bananas, and his favorite chocolate cookies.

chapters.title: Back Home
chapters.content: When he returns home, Mark organizes everything in the kitchen. Then he makes pasta for dinner and relaxes for the evening.
